articles.title: 13 Retro Games Revived for PS5
articles.description: A wave of retro games is being revived for PS5, led by QUByte. Expect compilations and collections to hit the platform soon.
articles.impact: Reviving classics boosts PS5's game library.

articles.title: Gemini Live Gains Memory Access
articles.description: Google's Gemini Live now integrates Memory access, enhancing chat experiences. This follows a recent redesign and new voice features.
articles.impact: Improved chat functionality enhances user experience.

articles.title: Shinobi: Art of Vengeance on Switch 2
articles.description: SEGA announces Shinobi: Art of Vengeance for Nintendo Switch 2, launching September 24, 2026. This version includes new features.
articles.impact: Revival of Shinobi expands Switch 2's library.

articles.title: iOS 27 to Feature Standalone Siri App
articles.description: Apple's iOS 27 will launch a standalone Siri app, enhancing its functionality. Users can expect significant upgrades with the update.
articles.impact: Standalone Siri app improves user interaction.

articles.title: Best Early Prime Day TV Deals
articles.description: CNN highlights the top six early Prime Day TV deals, tested by experts. Great discounts available ahead of Amazon's summer sale.

articles.title: GTA 6 Pre-Orders Start June 25
articles.description: Rockstar Games announces that Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders will begin on June 25, 2026, alongside the reveal of cover art.

articles.title: Easier WhatsApp Backup Management
articles.description: Google Play services update simplifies WhatsApp backup management directly in device settings. Users can now manage backups more efficiently.
articles.impact: Streamlined backup process enhances user convenience.

articles.title: Google AI Misrepresents SCP Fiction
articles.description: Google's AI Overviews mistakenly presents SCP horror fiction entities as real. This raises concerns about AI accuracy in information dissemination.
articles.impact: AI's credibility is questioned due to inaccuracies.

articles.title: Sennheiser Launches Open Wireless Earbuds
articles.description: Sennheiser enters the open-ear audio market with the Accentum Clip. These clip-on wireless earbuds offer unique advantages.
articles.impact: Sennheiser diversifies its audio product line.

articles.title: Insta360 Luna Ultra Review
articles.description: Insta360's Luna Ultra aims to compete in the vlogging market, challenging DJI's dominance. The camera has notable strengths and weaknesses.
articles.impact: New competition may disrupt vlogging market.

articles.title: Snap's AR Glasses Development Costs
articles.description: Analysts estimate Snap's new AR glasses cost significantly to develop, impacting stock performance. The glasses are priced at $2,195.
articles.impact: High development costs challenge Snap's market position.

articles.title: DragonForce Hackers Exploit Microsoft Teams
articles.description: DragonForce hackers used Backdoor.Turn to conceal command-and-control traffic via Microsoft Teams during a recent attack.
articles.impact: Cybersecurity threats evolve with new tactics.

articles.title: Free PS5 RPGs Available Now
articles.description: The PS Store offers two free RPGs, Mistfall Hunter and Once Human, available to all players without a PS Plus subscription.
articles.impact: Free games boost PS5 player engagement.

articles.title: Breakthrough in Holographic Imaging
articles.description: A new 3D imaging system overcomes challenges in holographic technology, marking significant progress in the field.
articles.impact: Advancements in holography could revolutionize imaging.
